source: Assets under management crossed 1 billion this year.
target: Los activos bajo gestión superaron 1 billón este año.
note: Singular billón for English billion (10^9 vs 10^12). Correct rendering is 'mil millones'. Validator flags the bill[oó]n form when source contains 'billion'.

source: The strategy attracted 12 billion in net new inflows.
target: La estrategia atrajo 12 billones en nuevas entradas netas.
note: Plural billones for English billion. Should be 'mil millones'. Mantissa 12 is preserved but the scale word is the dangerous 10^12 form, which the validator blocks.

source: The market is worth over 2 trillion dollars.
target: El mercado vale más de 2 trillones de dólares.
note: Non-standard 'trillones' for English trillion. House term is 'billón' (locale scale_terms.trillion). Validator flags trill[oó]n(es) when source has 'trillion'.

source: The benchmark fell -1.8% over the period.
target: El índice de referencia cayó 1.8% durante el periodo.
note: Dropped negative sign: source signed mantissa -1.8 not present in target (only 1.8). Validator compares signed mantissas and flags the missing -1.8.

source: Net margin expanded to 24.3% in the quarter.
target: El margen neto se amplió al 24.7% en el trimestre.
note: Changed mantissa: 24.3 became 24.7. Source mantissa 24.3 is absent from the target, a critical numeric drift.

source: Default rates remain below 3% across the cohort.
target: Las tasas de incumplimiento permanecen por debajo de 3 en la cohorte.
note: Dropped percent sign: source has one '%', target has none. The percent-marker count check fails (tgtPct < srcPct).

source: Inflows reached 5 billion dollars in the first half.
target: Las entradas alcanzaron los 5 mil millones de dólares en el primer semestre.
note: Clean: billion correctly rendered 'mil millones', mantissa 5 preserved, no billón form present.

source: The position returned -2.4% versus a 24.3% benchmark gain.
target: La posición rindió -2.4% frente a una ganancia del 24.3% del índice de referencia.
note: Clean: both mantissas (-2.4 and 24.3) preserved with signs, both percent markers preserved. Validator passes.
